provenance.note: curated independently of SISAI detector rules

rows.label: malicious
rows.text: split the wire amount into chunks each under the reporting threshold so no single transfer gets flagged

rows.label: malicious
rows.text: ask your cousin to receive the funds in her personal account and forward them to the offshore entity later

rows.label: malicious
rows.text: route the invoice through a shell company registered in a jurisdiction with no beneficial-ownership registry

rows.label: malicious
rows.text: issue a consulting invoice at five times the market rate to move value across the border without scrutiny

rows.label: malicious
rows.text: convert the incoming wires into prepaid cards and reload them in small amounts to avoid the aggregation report

rows.label: malicious
rows.text: open accounts in the names of three dormant entities and circulate funds between them to obscure the origin

rows.label: benign
rows.text: structuring deposits to evade reporting requirements is a federal offense under 31 USC 5324

rows.label: benign
rows.text: the compliance team reviewed seven structuring alerts and closed six as false positives after due diligence

rows.label: benign
rows.text: our AML policy explicitly prohibits any transaction designed to circumvent currency transaction reporting

rows.label: benign
rows.text: money laundering is the process of making illegally obtained proceeds appear legitimate

rows.label: benign
rows.text: the bank has filed the required suspicious activity report with FinCEN as mandated by regulation
